Given an OVE cluster with 3 control plane nodes
And all the IRI registries are accessible

When all the IRI registries become not accessible

Then all the MachineConfigNodes should be degraded
And the InternalReleaseImage resource should be degraded
And no release will be available (and degraded) via api-int
